triage.title: What's happening?
triage.subtitle: Tap what you see. We'll talk you through it, out loud, one step at a time.
triage.pinned: {{name}} has an allergy on file — tap here first
triage.disclaimer: For first-aid reference only. If your child is in immediate danger, contact your local emergency number.

guided.completeBody: Keep going until help arrives or your child recovers and is breathing normally.

scenes.checkInfant: Tap the foot · Watch the chest · 10 seconds
scenes.checkChild: Tap the shoulder · Call their name · Watch the chest
scenes.layFlat: Firm flat surface · Floor is best
scenes.placeTwoFinger: 2 fingers · Centre of chest · Below nipple line
scenes.placeHeel: Heel of one hand · Centre of chest · Arms straight
scenes.pushInfant: Push 4 cm deep · Let the chest rise back
scenes.pushChild: Push 5 cm deep · Shoulders above your hands
scenes.beat30: 30 pushes · Follow the beat · Count out loud
scenes.airway: Tilt the head back gently · Lift the chin
scenes.breathsInfant: Cover mouth AND nose · 2 small puffs · Watch the chest rise
scenes.breathsChild: Pinch the nose · Seal the mouth · 1 second per breath
scenes.recovery: Roll onto the side · Head tilted back · Stay with them
